mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM haosen_project..hr_monitoring_data
AND batch_id = #{condition.batchId}
AND key_id = #{condition.keyId}
AND address LIKE '%' + #{condition.address} + '%'
AND product_name LIKE '%' + #{condition.productName} + '%'
AND name LIKE '%' + #{condition.name} + '%'
AND business_license_name LIKE '%' + #{condition.businessLicenseName} + '%'
AND province = #{condition.province}
AND created_time >= #{condition.createTime} + ' 00:00:00' AND created_time <= #{condition.createTime} + ' 23:59:59'
ORDER BY create_time DESC
OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 100 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO haosen_project..hr_monitoring_data_tmp ( batch_id, serial_no, monitoring_year, id, product_name, platform, generic_name, url, specification, online_store_price, box_quantity, unit_price_per_box, store_name, business_license_name, province, city, sales_volume, category, created_time, crawled_time, repeated_count, shipping_origin, key_id, name, address, standardized_province, short_name, remarks ) VALUES
( #{item.batchId}, #{item.serialNo}, #{item.monitoringYear}, #{item.id}, #{item.productName}, #{item.platform}, #{item.genericName}, #{item.url}, #{item.specification}, #{item.onlineStorePrice}, #{item.boxQuantity}, #{item.unitPricePerBox}, #{item.storeName}, #{item.businessLicenseName}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.salesVolume}, #{item.category}, #{item.createdTime}, #{item.crawledTime}, #{item.repeatedCount}, #{item.shippingOrigin}, #{item.keyId}, #{item.name}, #{item.address}, #{item.standardizedProvince}, #{item.shortName}, #{item.remarks} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM haosen_project..hr_monitoring_data WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT serial_no, monitoring_year, id, product_name, platform, generic_name, short_name, specification, online_store_price, box_quantity, unit_price_per_box, store_name, business_license_name, province, city, sales_volume, category, created_time, crawled_time, repeated_count, shipping_origin, key_id, name, address, url, standardized_province, remarks FROM haosen_project..hr_monitoring_data WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY serial_no ASC
